project-modal-message: This project doesn't have a deployed website yet, but you can explore the source code and documentation on GitHub.
hero-formation: Trained inside and outside the classroom to be
about-description-1: As a computer engineer with a lifelong passion for technology, I bring perseverance and ambition to everything I do, both professionally and personally.
about-description-2: With over a decade of experience playing the saxophone and a strong dedication to sports, I've developed a deep appreciation for discipline, commitment and teamwork.
about-description-3: International environments particularly inspire me. I enjoy learning new languages and collaborating with people from diverse cultural backgrounds, an experience I found especially rewarding during my Erasmus exchange.
skills-description: Technologies and tools I master to create innovative solutions
projects-description: A selection of my most recent and outstanding work
project-1-description: Advanced web application for vinyl record collection management. Features user system, wishlist, shared reviews, automatic cover generation and intelligent image management.
project-2-description: Modern web app for searching, filtering, and discovering terminal commands (Git, Docker, Linux, AWS, npm, etc.) with instant fuzzy search, animated filters, and a responsive, accessible interface. Optimized for performance and advanced user experience.
project-3-description: Reusable frontend component library built with React, Vite and Tailwind CSS. Over 50 ready-to-use components with dark/light mode, responsive design and intelligent search system.
project-4-description: WPF desktop application in C# to experiment and compare the performance of different parallelism and asynchrony techniques in text encryption. Includes TPL, Parallel.ForEach, Async/Await, cancellation support and performance measurement.
ntt-desc:
I actively collaborate in the development of a critical health management platform, designed to optimize the interaction between citizens and health services.

My role ranges from analyzing and understanding a complex architecture to implementing new features and resolving incidents. I participate in the entire development lifecycle, ensuring code quality through rigorous unit testing and detailed technical documentation, all integrated into an agile and collaborative environment.
education-description: My academic background and professional certifications
contact-text: Did you like my profile and think I could fit in your company or project? Don't hesitate to contact me.
